title: Symbols that pop-up when you click the smiley face

posts.author: dED_Community (Carmen Wilson (dED_UCATION))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone!

I’ve been searching for something related to these symbols that pop-up (see image).

You can use these in date columns or text columns. Is there a complete list of where I can use these and does anyone have reccomendations for what they mean in terms of workflow and updating/signaling message to team.

Thanks

Continuing the discussion from Symbols/Emojis that pop-up when you click the smiley face:

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @dED_Community! These emojis and symbols can mean whatever you’d like them to mean for your team but if you have any further questions you’d like to discuss, shoot us a message at support@monday.com!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
